message:
fix(collect): correct off-by-one in quick_scan.rs minimum field check

The ps format string includes tty (11 fixed fields before lstart),
making the actual minimum 18 fields (indices 0-17), not 17. With the
old check (< 17), a 17-field line would pass validation but
fields.get(17) for comm would return None, silently producing an
empty command name. The comm_idx=17 was already correct; only the
guard and comments were wrong.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
